title: hoya baguioensis subsp. baguioensis
intro: Hoya baguioensis subsp. baguioensis, also known as the Baguio Hoya, is a rare and exotic species of flowering plant native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the heart and improve circulation, thanks to the presence of a compound called hoya alkaloid. The Baguio Hoya is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its sedative and antispasmodic properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the Baguio Hoya are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal benefits, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
